speaker: charlie
text: <cite index="36-2,36-3">Now here's something to make you proud - India's absolutely dominating at the Commonwealth Youth Weightlifting Championships in Samoa, picking up four gold medals just on the second day of competition alone</cite>. Young Sunil Singh clinched gold in the men's 65-kilogram category with a whopping 271 kilograms total lift.

speaker: alice
text: That's incredible strength for such a young athlete! <cite index="38-2,38-11">Meanwhile the World Snooker Championship is heating up at the Crucible with reigning world champion Zhao Xintong fighting to reach the semifinals</cite>. <cite index="38-14">Ronnie O'Sullivan's through after a commanding 10-2 victory</cite> - the old master's still got it!

speaker: charlie
text: <cite index="39-10,39-13">And in hockey, Connor McDavid's back on the ice for the Oilers in what's basically a do-or-die Game 5 against the Ducks - they're trying to rally from being down 3-1 in the series</cite>. Nothing like playoff hockey to get the blood pumping, even if it's not exactly our sport down under!
